'''K'zk''' was a [[Qwohog (species)|Qwohog]] who piloted a rented barge. He was present on [[Zelos II]], and betrayed [[Solum'ke]] and [[Diergu-Rea Duhnes'rd]] alongside two [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]] in a treasure hunt during the [[Day of the Sepulchral Night]].

{{Char-stub}}
